title: FusionCore
description: Mostly technical mod with fusion reactors, storage and new dimension with things to explore!
body:
### Mostly technical mod with fusion reactors, storage and new dimension with things to explore!

 

Current Features:
- Custom energy crystal
- Carpet made from the crystal
- Astral Window for looking into .hrd maps

 

Future features:

- Cables
- Storage system
- Two types of fusion reactors
- Cosmetic stuff
- Dimension with lot of lore and things to explore
- Mysterious mobs
 

Credits:
- Sam
